title: Neuro-symbolic AI Workshop
subtitle: SPIKE Research Group — Imperial College London
intro: A one-day workshop bringing together researchers to explore the intersection of neural and symbolic approaches to AI. The morning features lightning talks from group members, followed by afternoon breakout sessions to discuss potential collaborations and future directions in neuro-symbolic AI.

schedule.title: Welcome & Introduction
schedule.speaker: Prof. Alessandra Russo
schedule.abstract: An overview of the SPIKE group's research agenda and the goals of this workshop, setting the stage for a day of lightning talks and collaborative breakout sessions on neuro-symbolic AI.

schedule.title: Breakout Groups — Topic Selection
schedule.abstract: Participants propose and vote on discussion topics drawn from the morning talks. Groups of 4–6 form around the most popular themes.

schedule.title: Breakout Session 1: Collaborations
schedule.abstract: Small-group discussions exploring concrete collaboration opportunities between neural and symbolic research threads within the group.

schedule.title: Breakout Session 2: Future Directions
schedule.abstract: Forward-looking discussion on open problems and promising research directions in neuro-symbolic AI, with an eye toward grant proposals and shared infrastructure.

schedule.title: Group Reports & Wrap-up
schedule.abstract: Each breakout group presents a brief summary of their discussion, followed by a plenary wrap-up identifying key action items and next steps.
